The two Grunts are standing at the mansion's gate and will initiate a double battle when you get close to them.
Grunt on the left side of the double battle
Grunt on the rignt side of the double battle
Grunt guarding the first door of the left corridor (when walking right to left)

You can find Protein in the room's trash

Lets a Clefairy escape once defeated
Grunt guarding the third door of the left corridor (when walking right to left)
Lets a Clefairy escape once defeated
Grunt guarding the door at the end of the left corridor. Talking to him triggers a gauntlet. You have to defeat him and two other Grunts in 6 turns.
Once you defeated the gauntlet in 6 turns a Clefairy escapes
Grunt guarding the door in the right corridor.
Lets a Clefairy escape once defeated
You can find TM87s Swagger in the room

Once you have defeated all the Grunts in the mansion come to the center of the building and talk to the mons surrounding the last Grunt. With the last Grunt disapearred and Happiny giving you a Lucky Egg the double battle with the Rival against Gentleman Backlot and Commander Saturn starts.
Backlot is on the left side of the battle
Saturn is on the right side of the battle
Once defeated you gain access to the Trophy Garden and can get a Manaphy egg
